description: Press Association / PA Media provides media and data services, including TV listings and metadata. Its public developer documentation for this domain centers on a TV data API for accessing programme, schedule, platform, channel, contributor, feature, and catalogue resources.
summary: pressassociation.io exposes one documented developer integration surface: the TV API, a REST HTTP API at https://tv.api.pressassociation.io/v2 authenticated with a Press Association-issued API key via header or query parameter.
